response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software craftsmanship, with over 15 years of hands-on engineering experience and a commendable entrepreneurial drive demonstrated by founding GISCollective. However, this Principal Engineer role requires Director-level strategic leadership and deep, recognized expertise in AI and machine learning. His resume shows only a very recent, brief mention of AI-related work, lacking the advanced AI qualifications, cloud AI strategy advising, and high-level product differentiation experience necessary for the position.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure development.
Entrepreneurial experience as a founder and open-source contributor, aligning with preferred startup qualifications.
Proven track record of technical mentorship and knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and dojos.
concerns: Lacks recognized expertise and significant professional experience in AI/ML and AI-powered product development.
Missing Director-level strategic leadership and experience advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption.
Does not hold a preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
